summary: Verified bridge_built observation chain end-to-end. Both Path A (world-map -> click-place) and Path B (edge-walk -> drag-place) flow through the same ConstructionSystem.tryPlace -> completeBuild -> dialogEvent (step: activeQuest) -> LocalSceneBase.advanceFromDialog -> questSystem.advanceQuest path. The drag-mode addition in commit f647de8 only changes the input wiring on _renderGhost (pointerdown lifts a moving ghost vs. firing tryPlace immediately); the completion contract is identical. No code edits required.

traced_event_chain.construction_system_emit: src/renderer/game/systems/construction/constructionSystem.js:516 (completeBuild) — reads blueprint.completion.observation at line 525, pushes onto state.observations at lines 526-532, sets state[completion.stateFlag]='bridgeBuilt' at lines 535-537, and at lines 549-554 fires dialogEvent { speaker, text, choices: null, step: aq } where aq === state.activeQuest IFF aq.id === completion.questId ('bridge_collapse').
traced_event_chain.tryPlace_invokes_completeBuild: src/renderer/game/systems/construction/constructionSystem.js:485-498 — when isComplete() and not _completing, awaits opts.onAllPlaced (DryWashScene's bike-crossing animation, autoCompleteAfterAllPlaced:false) and DryWashScene calls system.completeBuild() explicitly at src/renderer/game/scenes/DryWashScene.js:458.
traced_event_chain.dialog_event_to_advance: src/renderer/game/GameContainer.jsx:590-595 — handleDialogContinue iterates active scenes and calls scene.advanceFromDialog(choiceIndex).
traced_event_chain.advance_from_dialog: src/renderer/game/scenes/LocalSceneBase.js:93-135 — calls advanceQuest(state, choiceIndex) and persists; default impl is inherited by DryWashScene.
traced_event_chain.questSystem_observe_step: src/renderer/game/systems/questSystem.js:199-202 — for step.type === 'observe' the function auto-advances (the 'detection' is the dialog-tagged step itself; state.observations is informational/journaling).

drag_mode_diff_audit.drag_path: constructionSystem.js:225 -> _beginDrag (256) -> _onDragUp (337) -> tryPlace(hitSlotId) at line 355 — same tryPlace, same slot ids, same blueprint.completion. No new event names invented; both routes converge on completeBuild() and emit observation 'bridge_built'.

path_results.path_a_world_map_click_place: PASS — world-map -> DryWashScene boots normally, _construction mounts BRIDGE_MESQUITE_BLUEPRINT, _renderGhost wires pointerdown->tryPlace, completion fires identical dialogEvent + observation, advanceFromDialog advances bridge_collapse step 15.
path_results.path_b_edge_walk_drag_place: PASS — edge-walk entry from Neighborhood drops player into DryWashScene with entryEdge='west' (handled by phaser-dry-wash-scene); blueprint.mode === 'drag' triggers _beginDrag/_onDragUp; tryPlace(hitSlotId) eventually triggers completeBuild() with the same completion.observation 'bridge_built'. The dialogEvent payload shape is identical (speaker/text/choices/step). Step 15 advances via the same advanceFromDialog path.

notes.build_status: Not re-run — no edits made. Build was verified in commit f647de8 per spec.
